title: gingidia trifoliolata
intro: Gingidia trifoliolata, also known as New Zealand angelica or Three-leafed gingidia, is a native New Zealand plant belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant's medicinal properties lie in its roots, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and colds. The health benefits of Gingidia trifoliolata include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce pain and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Gingidia trifoliolata can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it is also used in traditional medicine to make tinctures and other herbal preparations.
